SIR row: Mamata claims names of people belonging to 'specific communities' deleted from voter rolls
description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has accused authorities of selectively removing names from voter rolls ahead of assembly elections. She stated that nearly 91 lakh voters were deleted post-revision, with her intervention in the Supreme Court restoring about 32 lakh names. Banerjee alleged that specific communities were targeted in these deletions.

description: Mukesh Kumar has emerged as an unlikely yet vital weapon for Delhi Capitals in IPL 2026, silencing doubters with discipline and control. Backed by the team management, the Bengal pacer has relied on hard lengths and consistency to deliver.

India’s nuclear push gets boost as breeder reactor reaches criticality; why it matters
description: India's indigenously developed Prototype Fast Breeder Reactor (PFBR) at Kalpakkam has achieved criticality, a significant step towards nuclear fuel self-reliance. This milestone advances the country's second stage of its nuclear program, aiming to generate more fuel than it consumes and bolster long-term energy security.

title: In ‘Project Hail Mary’, the countries comes together to face an existential threat. That’s the real science fiction
'Dhurandhar 2' collection day 20: Ranveer Singh film surges past Rs. 1,025 crore
description: Aditya Dhar’s 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has scripted history as the first Hindi film to breach the Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone. Globally, the thriller has amassed Rs. 1,622.72 crore, outperforming blockbusters like Jawan. Despite the IPL 2026 season and a 229-minute runtime, the film remains a powerhouse. To boost family viewership, makers have released updated prints with muted abuses and technical fixes. Now the third-highest-grossing Indian film globally, the spy saga eyes the Rs. 1,700 crore mark.

description: Arjun Tendulkar is impressing Lucknow Super Giants' net sessions with his accurate yorkers, troubling top batters like Rishabh Pant. Videos of his disciplined bowling have gone viral, fueling fan calls for his inclusion. After two seasons with Mumbai Indians, the young pacer is making a strong case for selection at LSG with his consistent performance, despite limited match opportunities so far.

title: Retired hurt: Campbell Wilson’s mixed-bag innings at Air India draws to a close a year before end of his term
'Already fled to Hyderabad': Himanta mocks Khera as police search his Delhi residence
description: Assam Police searched Congress leader Pawan Khera's Delhi residence following an FIR by Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma's wife over passport allegations. Khera had claimed Sarma's wife held three passports, a charge denied by the BJP. The Chief Minister vowed strong action, accusing Congress of using unauthorized documents and alleging Pakistani links.

title: Scientists find promising new drug against rare, life-threatening kidney disease
description: A groundbreaking oral drug, N-propargylglycine (N-PPG), has shown remarkable success in preventing fatal kidney damage in mice with Primary Hyperoxaluria Type 2 (PH2). This rare genetic disorder causes excessive oxalate buildup, leading to kidney failure. The drug effectively halts stone formation and protects kidneys, offering significant hope for a new treatment and potentially reducing the need for transplants.

description: Dalal Street opened higher on Tuesday, with benchmark indices rising after a strong rebound in the previous session. Intense buying in banking and IT stocks, coupled with a strengthening rupee, boosted investor confidence. Global markets showed a mixed trend as oil prices climbed amid Middle East tensions.

title: Daily Briefing: US warns Iran on ceasefire, signals larger strikes ahead
Rory McIlroy marriage drama deepens as book reveals divorce twist
description: Rory McIlroy’s short-lived divorce from Erica Stoll in 2024 drew huge attention, especially with Amanda Balionis rumors. A new book by Alan Shipnuck shares inside details, but confirms no affair. The couple reunited within a month, calling it a “wake-up call.” Despite personal challenges, McIlroy continues to focus on golf with family support.

title: Kittle linked to Cowboys move as 49ers eye $5M defensive upgrade
description: Jadeveon Clowney is a highly rated edge defender. He last played for the Dallas Cowboys. He is a potential target for the San Francisco 49ers. Their roster has injured players and the farewell of Bryce Huff. Clowney’s beyond impressive 2025 stats and PFF grades could bolster the Niners’ weakest in the league pass rush. However, he told KPRC 2 that he wants a reunion with Lamar Jackson in Baltimore.

title: Canada has changed immigration rules; changing visa fee, work permit rules and more
description: Canada's immigration landscape is shifting from April 2026 with passport and citizenship fee increases, offset by a 30-day processing guarantee. Super visa rules are relaxed, allowing sponsors more flexibility. Provinces gain increased autonomy in immigration assessments, while rural employers benefit from expanded foreign worker quotas.

title: Joey Barton assault case: Kevin Lynch may lose eyesight in one eye
description: Former footballer Joey Barton has been remanded in custody after an alleged assault on Kevin Lynch at Huyton and Prescot Golf Club in Liverpool. Lynch suffered serious facial injuries and may lose sight in one eye. Barton and Gary O’Grady face grievous bodily harm charges. On the same day, a court also ordered Barton to pay damages to Eni Aluko.
